name: [GRIDHAND] CRM Sync Agent - Email reply detected → update CRM last contact date

gridhand.scenario: Email reply detected → update CRM last contact date
gridhand.description: When an email reply is detected from a customer, GRIDHAND's automation workflow is triggered, which updates the last contact date in the business's CRM system, such as HubSpot, to reflect the current date and time, ensuring that the customer's interaction history is always up-to-date. This workflow runs daily at 8am, allowing the business owner to see the latest customer engagement when they start their day, and enabling them to prioritize follow-ups and personalize marketing efforts. By automating this process, the business owner can save time and focus on high-value activities, while also improving the accuracy of their customer relationship management and enhancing overall customer satisfaction.
